messages.text:
Hey Lawrence, any chance you saw my emails? 

I'm offering 200 usd for 60 min of your time to chat about Exclaimer's integrations & AI agents. 

Open to it?
Hi Nik
Could you please let me know a little more about the call?

Sounds good. 

Does Friday 19th between 11am-2pm UK time work for you?

Perfect! Let's do 12:45 UK time next Friday?

 Please share your email and I'll send the invite.
Great. It's lawrence.tatham@exclaimer.com
Have a nice weekend

thanks :) 

likewise!

I booked a call for 12:30, a little change of plans. Hope that's okay! I also asked our Head of Strategic Accounts, Mariana, to join.

Looking forward!

messages.author: lwood@axonify.com
messages.text:
Very sorry, I needed to book some last minute travel and will lot longer be
able to make this time. Do you have availability Wednesday May 27th between
9 and 12pm ET?

messages.author: m.r.guerci@albato.com
messages.text:
Hi Larysa,

Thanks for the heads-up, no worries at all!
I’ve moved the call to next Wednesday at 10am ET. Looking forward to speaking then.

messages.author: tanya@albato.com
messages.text:
Hi Larysa,

I just want to confirm our meeting today. Are we still good?

Looking forward to connecting with you.

Best,

messages.author: lwood@axonify.com
messages.text: Still good, speak to you soon

messages.author: dominik.szczechla@surfe.com
messages.text:
I can share a shortlist, you can say if you could do it, did it or have it
on the radar ;)

ZOHO CRM (this one was on the list), Creatio, Adobe Experience Cloud and
SAP as CRM's to sync leads into

We were thinking of integrating a dialer such as Nooks

From sales enablement we'd love to get Gong Engage.

Almost every integration requires our user to connect their own account for
those services, via API key or OAuth flow.

I think we could set up an hour and see if some of those would be better
and cheaper to plug-and-play with your platform instead.

messages.author: tanya@albato.com
messages.text:
Thanks a lot for the list, Dominik.
After a high-level review, we should be able to deliver these apps. For some systems, we’ll need API access and clarification of your use cases.

I suggest setting up a call to discuss this in more detail. Could you grab a slot from the calendar?
Have a nice evening!

Best,

messages.author: tanya@albato.com
messages.text:
Hi Dominik,
Hope you had a restful weekend!

Let me know the best time to connect this week.

Happy to discuss your integrations list together and share more about our capabilities so you can compare in-house vs plug-and-play with our platform.

Best,

messages.author: dominik.szczechla@surfe.com
messages.text:
Hey!

We quickly moved from a paid discovery straight to my organization's needs
and into a sales call direction :)  Happy to meet for a *discovery* call.
Don't want to go into a situation when its basically a sales pitch with a
little something for me on top - it's a classic conflict of interest if I
recommend your platform later on after getting something first.

Regards

messages.author: tanya@albato.com
messages.text:
Hi Dominik,

You are absolutely right!

I was referring to a paid 1-hour discovery call, as proposed initially. No pitches, no hard sell. Just a casual chat to go through your integration priorities (you already shared a list) and see if Albato could add value now or down the road.

Does that work for you? Happy to hear if you had something different in mind.

Best,

messages.author: dominik.szczechla@surfe.com
messages.text:
Lets meet on Friday, if that works for you.

Regards

messages.author: tanya@albato.com
messages.text:
Hi Dominik,

Friday works. Talk to you soon.
Have a nice day!

Best,

messages.author: l.goldfarb@albato.com
messages.text:
Hi Taylor,

I hope you’re having a great week.

I saw that you declined our meeting this Friday.

Is there a chance we could reschedule?

messages.author: l.goldfarb@albato.com
messages.text:
Hi Taylor,

I'd really appreciate a quick note on why the call was declined and if it makes sense for us to reconnect on another day.

If the integration opportunity has shifted down on your priority list, no problem at all.

Happy to step back and revisit when the timing is better.

Have a great week!

messages.author: taylor@grain.co
messages.text:
Hi Leo-

Unfortunately, I’ve learned that I will not be in this position for much
longer. I just don’t have the capacity to champion the partnership.

Best of luck,
Taylor

messages.author: l.goldfarb@albato.com
messages.text:
Hi Taylor,

Thanks for letting me know and I’m sorry to hear that.

If it isn’t too much to ask, would it be possible to introduce us to
someone who might be best placed to help drive our project on Grain’s side?

Either way, I wish you all the best and thank you very much for working
with us on this!

Best,
Leo

messages.author: l.goldfarb@albato.com
messages.text:
P.S. If an intro isn't possible, a quick pointer to the right contact at Grain would be super helpful.

Have a great Friday!

messages.text: Hi Leo, Can we reschedule for next week? It's not urgent for us and I have other meetings that are conflicting. Thanks.

Hey Alex,

Absolutely!

Can we meet next Wednesday (March 25th) at the same time?

I just grabbed a slot on your calendar. Please let me know if that works
for you.

---
Best,

messages.text:
Hey Alex,

Hope next Wednesday (March 25th) at the same time works for you. Could you please let me know?
If the time works, I’d really appreciate it if we could extend to 60 minutes as initially proposed (or at least 45)
Have a nice day.

Hey Alex,
Hope you had a restful weekend.
Are we still on for a meeting this Wed?
Let me know if it's possible on your side to extend the meeting to 60 min, or at least 45 min. Would really help us cover everything.
Have a nice start to the week!
Best,

deal_name: Surfe — missing apps objection + build vs buy

messages.text:
Hey Mike.

Interesting opening for a cold email ;) 200 of what and in what form?

I am actually a PM also of Integrations departament of Surfe. We integrate 4 CRM's, a few dozen enrichment providers and some sales outreach solutions. Streamlining all of this would be interesting, but I did not see most of the products that are interesting for us on https://albato.com/apps. Or this is not a list of integrations you provide?

I am investigating build vs buy on some of the integrations, so yes, the discussion might be interesting

Hi Dominik,

The $200 is a personal gift card, redeemable across 180+ brands including Amazon, Airbnb, Apple, and Starbucks.

On the app catalog: don't worry about missing apps. We custom-build integrations for customers in a matter of days. It's part of the managed service.

Which specific apps are you not seeing in the catalog?

On the build vs buy side: you're already maintaining connectors across 4 CRMs and dozens of enrichment tools. Every time HubSpot ships a schema change, someone on your team absorbs it. Albato Embedded handles that maintenance layer and gives Surfe a unified API that stays consistent regardless of connector version changes.

Happy to have a quick call and walk you through Albato and the process of building custom apps.

Best,
Mike

notes: Short follow-up #1 after sending SaaStr exec summary. No pitch, no meeting push. Two direct questions: was the summary useful, are integrations on their radar. Signed as Leo Goldfarb.

messages.text:
Hi Jarod,

Did the SaaStr summary end up being useful?

Still curious whether the integration trends in there match what you're seeing at Vivun. Are integrations and AI agent execution on your radar this year?

Best,

Leo Goldfarb
Co-founder @Albato
Hi Mike. Happy to chat.

Hi Eden,

Great, looking forward to it.

Could you please grab a 1-hour slot here: <https://meetings.hubspot.com/marianaguerci/meet-with-albato>

Thanks,
Talk soon!

Hey Yuriy,

Hope you're having a great week!

I recently had Leo Goldfarb (co-founder of Albato) on my podcast. 

They offer a white-label integration platform with 1K+ apps that SaaS companies embed directly into their products ( https://albato.com/embedded )

Since Pipeline CRM is pushing upmarket and automation is your key differentiator, I figured more native integrations might make sense.

CCed Leo here, so you can follow up right away if that's interesting.

P.S. Albato has also launched a unified MCP for AI assistants that lets them execute across 1K+ external tools. 
 Cheers, Anna Head of Growth saas.group 
 📢  saas.unbound podcast 
🙌 saas.connect events

Hey Yuriy,

Is exploring white-label integrations for Pipeline CRM still on your radar?

Happy to find a time that works for a quick intro call.

Best,
Leo
